allow: PowerShell($node = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($node\) { "node: $\($node.Source\)" } else { "node: NOT FOUND" }; $py = Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py\) { "python: $\($py.Source\)" } else { "python: NOT FOUND" }; $py3 = Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($py3\) { "py: $\($py3.Source\)" } else { "py: NOT FOUND" })
